decisions.title: Prioritize Explore V2 GA over new feature development
decisions.context: Heavy engineering investment in E2 migration (geomap, pathname, table improvements) signals final push to GA. Must decide if we delay Canvas/Python Rules work to ship E2 faster or maintain parallel tracks.

arguments.for: Concentrating force on E2 GA delivers immediate customer value, reduces technical debt, and validates 'Nail the Core' pillar. Current velocity suggests GA possible by Q2 end.
arguments.against: Pausing Canvas/Python Rules delays 'Build the Moat' differentiation. Customers expecting AI-assisted workflows may churn to competitors shipping faster.

decisions.title: Approve Sift Edge compaction architecture for production
decisions.context: Massive engineering effort (ENG-9666 through 9677) on L0 filesystem, mergesort, s3 upload, compaction scheduler. Architecture appears finalized but needs product/exec sign-off before K8s deployment.
decisions.blockedBy: Pending performance benchmarks on production-scale datasets and cost analysis for S3 storage vs compute tradeoffs

arguments.for: Edge data volume growing 40% MoM. Current architecture won't scale past Q3. Compaction unlocks real-time analytics on edge data (North Star impact).
arguments.against: Complex distributed system adds operational burden. Alternative: Push compaction to customer infrastructure. Delays 6mo but reduces our infra costs 60%.

decisions.title: Enforce MFA for all users before FedRAMP certification
decisions.context: ENG-9300 (MFA enforcement) and ENG-9661/9662 (FedRAMP compliance) suggest enterprise security push. Must decide timeline: block new signups now or grandfather existing users until cert complete.

arguments.for: Immediate enforcement demonstrates security posture to enterprise prospects, accelerates FedRAMP timeline. Banner (ENG-9298) gives 30-day warning.
arguments.against: May disrupt existing users mid-analysis workflows. Grandfather approach maintains trust, delays enforcement until FedRAMP audit (est. Q3).

decisions.title: Standardize on Parquet multi-channel schema across all data ingestion
decisions.context: ENG-9649 creates formal Parquet schema crate. ENG-9645 fixes TDMS upload bugs. Signals consolidation around unified storage format critical for Ask SIFT's cross-dataset queries.

arguments.for: Single schema simplifies Ask SIFT training data pipeline, reduces storage costs 30%, enables faster query planning. 'Embed Deeper' via better integrations.
arguments.against: Migration breaks existing customer ETL scripts. Alternative: Support dual schemas through 2026, deprecate old format in 2027.

timeAudit.weekSummary: High coordination load from parallel E2 GA push + Edge infrastructure build. 3 one-on-ones addressing team velocity concerns on 'Moat' projects.
alerts: Only 2 focus blocks today—insufficient for deep product strategy work
32 meeting hours this week exceeds healthy threshold (target: <25hrs)
Zero time allocated to Ask SIFT roadmap review despite off-track KR

events.title: E2 GA Final Stakeholder Review
events.description: Engineering demo of geomap migration, table improvements, pathname updates. Go/no-go for Q2 GA target.

events.title: Sift Edge Compaction Design Review
events.description: Architecture walkthrough for L0→L1 compaction system. Discuss S3 costs, K8s orchestration, rollout plan.

events.title: Explore V2 GA Priority Decision Deadline
events.description: Final call on resource allocation: all-in on E2 GA vs maintain parallel 'Moat' workstreams.

events.title: Edge Compaction Production Approval Gate
events.description: Review benchmark results, approve K8s deployment config, set rollout schedule for compaction service.

events.title: MFA Enforcement Decision Deadline
events.description: Choose immediate MFA enforcement vs grandfathered rollout. Impacts FedRAMP timeline and user experience.

events.title: Parquet Schema Standardization Decision
events.description: Approve migration to unified multi-channel Parquet schema. Sets foundation for Ask SIFT data pipeline.

events.title: Q2 Strategy Checkpoint
events.description: Assess Nail the Core progress, recalibrate Build the Moat timeline based on E2 GA outcome.

events.title: FedRAMP Compliance Milestone 1
events.description: Complete Amplitude FedRAMP requirements implementation, submit initial documentation for audit prep.

events.title: Explore V2 GA Target Date
events.description: Public launch of Explore V2 with full E1 feature parity, new table/legend components, geomap improvements.

events.description: Complete K8s deployment, enable compaction for 50% of edge customers, monitor performance metrics.

events.title: Q2 North Star Review
events.description: Evaluate Decisions Captured Per Customer trajectory, adjust Q3 roadmap for Moat-building initiatives.
